description: Contract: fields[] and asset_layout_id parse from live-shape fixtures
Import writes hudu_fields in position order + hudu_synced_at; sibling attributes keys preserved
Sync updates hudu_fields when Hudu fields changed; row counted updated even when name/serial unchanged
Sync leaves attributes untouched for stale/missing Hudu assets
Asset card renders label/value rows when hudu_fields present; absent -> no card
Card strings resolve in en + 7 locales
normalize/resolve: 'excluded' round-trips; invalid still coerces to unknown; excluded distinct from unknown
Settings UI offers Don't import and persists it
Single import of excluded layout -> layout_excluded typed failure, no asset created
Bulk import skips excluded layouts; summary {created, skipped, failed} accurate
Manager hides Import on excluded rows; row still mappable; Import-all count excludes them
Sync with rmm_provider set: no name/serial in updateAsset payload; hudu_fields still refreshed; rmmSkipped counted
Import serial collision (other client, same tenant) -> serial_conflict naming existing asset; no asset created
Bulk: mixed excluded/conflict/success -> summary rows distinguish all three
Manager renders the three-way bulk summary
